name: Runick Destruction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神碑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects, but skip your next Battle Phase after activation;
● Target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy it, then banish the top 4 cards of your opponent's Deck.
● Special Summon 1 "Runick" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone.
You can only activate 1 "Runick Destruction" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
